---
title: "new_logs_ramon"
format: html
---

## Intro

This logbook will contain parts of the transcriptomics (and possible genomics) for the ROS1 minor generated sequencing data.

We we're given the data on 13-05-2026, and will first start by quality controll, to check for possible adapters, sizes, and amount of counts. This will be done using falco (https://github.com/smithlabcode/falco). 

```{bash, eval=FALSE}
ls /students/2025-2026/minor_ros1/fastq/*_S* | \
parallel "falco {} -o /students/2025-2026/ros1_transcriptomics/output_new/falco/{/.}_fastqc_report"

```

### Mapping

STAR snakemake etc

### Counts 


## Primers

Jasper did the DESEQ2 analysis for this data, which resulted a short DEG list, that i can use to generate new primers.

Repotrectinib
TNFRSF12A
CCND1
AMOTL2
F3
AJUBA
FHDC1
AMIGO2
EPHA2
CCN1
PPRC1
ADAMTS1
CDC42EP3
ELF3
NOLC1
FOSL1
C1orf116
Zidesamtinib
MT-ND6

This is the list
